result.stdout:
Usage: CouchbaseVerifier.dll [command]

Commands:

  describe  Provides description of an individual test
  generate  Generates an example test definitions file for editing
  list      Lists all tests that will be executed
  verify    Performs test verifications against a couchbase server node

Use "CouchbaseVerifier.dll [command] --help" for more information about a command.

Commands:

  describe  Provides description of an individual test
  generate  Generates an example test definitions file for editing
  list      Lists all tests that will be executed
  verify    Performs test verifications against a couchbase server node

Use "CouchbaseVerifier.dll [command] --help" for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Performs test verifications against a couchbase server node

Usage: CouchbaseVerifier.dll verify [options]

Options:

  --host              <TEXT>
  Couchbase Host to attempt connections to

  -u | --username     <TEXT>
  Username to use to connect to Couchbase Server Node

  -p | --password     <TEXT>
  Password to use to connect to Couchbase Server Node

  -d | --definitions  <TEXT>
  Path to a json file containing Test Definitions

  -t | --timeout      <NUMBER>  [60]
  How long to wait for a response from Couchbase Server

  -r | --retries      <NUMBER>  [5]
  The amount of times data will be attempted to be retrieved and validated against test definitions

commands.payload:
Performs test verifications against a couchbase server node

Usage: CouchbaseVerifier.dll verify [options]

Options:

  --host              <TEXT>
  Couchbase Host to attempt connections to

  -u | --username     <TEXT>
  Username to use to connect to Couchbase Server Node

  -p | --password     <TEXT>
  Password to use to connect to Couchbase Server Node

  -d | --definitions  <TEXT>
  Path to a json file containing Test Definitions

  -t | --timeout      <NUMBER>  [60]
  How long to wait for a response from Couchbase Server

  -r | --retries      <NUMBER>  [5]
  The amount of times data will be attempted to be retrieved and validated against test definitions
